merchant_id.description: Xsolla merchant ID, used as the Basic auth username. Never logged.

api_key.description: Xsolla merchant API key, used as the Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: Xsolla merchant API base URL override for tests or proxies.

project_id.description: Xsolla project ID; required for the 'orders' and 'transactions' streams (substituted into their project-scoped paths).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
